presets.description: Box -> Assign Block Type -> Geometry Viewer
Box -> Linear Array -> Transform Geometry
Box A + Box B -> Difference -> Bake Geometry To Blocks
A classic stone bridge with arch supports spanning a gap.
A defensive watchtower with crenellations and observation deck.
A cozy medieval cottage with timber frame, stone foundation, and pitched roof.
A clean, modern single-story house with flat roof and large windows.
A classical architectural column with base, shaft, and capital.
A basic door frame with threshold and lintel.
A classic gable (pitched) roof with adjustable pitch and overhang.
A circular spiral staircase with adjustable radius, height, and rotation.
A simple straight staircase connecting two levels.
A medieval-style arched window with stone frame and glass panes.
A simple rectangular window with clean lines, perfect for contemporary buildings.
An elegant circular fountain with tiered basin and central spout.
An open-air pavilion perfect for gardens and parks.
A simple box structure. Perfect for beginners to learn the basics of NodeCraft.
A simple sphere structure. Great for domes, planets, or decorative elements.
A simple wall segment with an arched gateway opening, perfect for gardens and courtyards.
A cylindrical tower with windows. Great for castles and fortifications.
A tall, mystical wizard tower with a conical roof and magical aesthetic.
A fortified castle keep with thick walls and corner towers.
A sleek modern building with glass walls and concrete frame, perfect for contemporary city builds.
